# Vansh Aggarwal | Front-End Web Developer

> Front-End Web Developer and B.Tech CSE student at Manipal University Jaipur, Faridabad, India

## About

Vansh Aggarwal is a Front-End Web Developer and Computer Science student at Manipal University Jaipur (2022–2026). He specializes in building full-stack web applications using React, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, and has hands-on experience integrating real-world features in live projects. He thinks about users, systems, and business problems — not just code.

## Contact

- Email: 6vansh9@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/6vansh9
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/6vansh9
- Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

## Key Skills

- **Languages**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, PHP, SQL, Python
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, ShadCN, Responsive Design
- **Backend**: REST APIs, PHP, Supabase
- **Tools**: Git, Power BI, Figma, Postman, Razorpay

## Experience

### Pinnacle Labs | Web Developer | June 2025 – July 2025
Designed and developed a full-stack restaurant website for a London-based café client using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP. Built a live table reservation and event booking system. Collaborated directly with the client to deliver the final product on schedule.

## Education

- Manipal University Jaipur | B.Tech CSE | 2022 – 2026
- Delhi Public School (DPS) | 2008 – 2022

## Featured Projects

- **TaskPay** (https://taskpay69.vercel.app) — AI-powered freelance marketplace for Indian college students. Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Razorpay, and Groq AI.

## Certifications

- Introduction to UI Design
- Scientific Computing with Python (freeCodeCamp)
- Front End Development Libraries (freeCodeCamp)
- Business Analysis & Process Management
- Building Custom Regional Reports with Google Analytics
